params.name: Nobel's Will
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.79%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.08%)
* [[Weekly_Events_History#Lottery_Week|Lottery Event]] 9/22/2023 - 9/28/2023
params.description:
On Sep 8, 1895 AD, Nobel left this will which promoted the world's development.

Nobel rejoiced at the news that his family's factory went bankrupt because it meant that he could fully engage in explosives research. Five years later, a massive explosion destroyed his factory and took his brother's life. In the following three years, his explosives were purchased by various countries, bringing Nobel wealth. But he found that wealth did not bring him happiness. Ultimately, Nobel used all of his we …
